title: Exploring a Donately–Monday.com Integration for Smarter Donation Tracking

posts.author: Timothy7 (Timothy Kariuki | CreativeBits LLC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community ,

We’re exploring the idea of building a Donately ↔ Monday.com integration to help teams manage and track donations more efficiently directly within Monday.

Our goal is to make it easier for organizations to:
• Sync donations from Donately to Monday in real time
• Differentiate between new and recurring donors
• Track donor updates automatically
• Calculate MTD, YTD, and lifetime donation totals
• Categorize donations based on frequency
• Provide consolidated analytics dashboards for donation insights

Before we move forward, we’d love to hear from the community:

Would this integration be useful for your team?
What features would you want to see included?
What challenges do you currently face when tracking donations in Monday.com?

Your feedback will help us shape the direction of this potential app.

Feel free to share your thoughts in the comments or reach out to us directly at monday@creativebits.us

Looking forward to hearing your ideas and suggestions!
